two-sum.title: Two Sum
two-sum.statement: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return the indices of the two numbers that add up to target. Each input has exactly one solution, and you may not use the same element twice.

valid-parentheses.title: Valid Parentheses
valid-parentheses.statement: Given a string s containing just the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', determine if the input string is valid. Brackets must close in the correct order and every closing bracket has a matching opening bracket of the same type.
